hero.title: Solutions by Medical Specialty
hero.description: Shop by clinical use-case rather than brand. Explore integrated equipment ecosystems tailored to your department's specific needs.

specialties.title: CSSD & Sterilization
specialties.description: Complete central sterile supply department solutions — autoclaves, flash sterilizers, CSSD furniture, and workflow integration.

specialties.title: Operating Theatre (OT) Integration
specialties.description: Surgical tables, OT lighting, electrosurgical units, suction systems, and complete theatre fit-out solutions.

specialties.title: Oncology & Ablation
specialties.description: RFA, microwave ablation, NanoKnife IRE systems, and AI-assisted imaging for targeted cancer treatment.

specialties.title: Diagnostic Imaging & Radiology
specialties.description: Portable DR, endoscopic ultrasound, CBCT imaging, and advanced diagnostic modalities from global partners.

specialties.title: Maternal / Neonatal Care
specialties.description: Radiant heat warmers, LED phototherapy units, infusion pumps, NST machines, and NICU equipment.

specialties.title: Dental Suites
specialties.description: Comprehensive operatory suites, CBCT imaging, and end-to-end dental practice infrastructure.

industries_heading.label: By Industry & Client
industries_heading.title: Who We Serve
industries_heading.description: Tailored solutions across healthcare, pharma, research, and medical device sectors.

industries.title: Healthcare
industries.description: From government tertiary hospitals to private chains, clinics, and specialty practices.

industries.title: Pharma & Biopharma
industries.description: Sterilization and cleanroom infrastructure for pharmaceutical manufacturing and quality-control labs.

industries.title: Medical Device Manufacturers
industries.description: Testing, validation, and sterilization equipment for device OEMs and component suppliers.

industries.title: Diagnostic Labs
industries.description: Imaging systems, lab sterilization, and diagnostic equipment for standalone and hospital-affiliated labs.

industries.title: Research Institutes
industries.description: Specialized sterilization and laboratory equipment for research and university facilities.

cta.title: Not sure which solution fits your facility?
cta.description: Our biomedical engineers can design an integrated solution combining equipment from multiple specialty areas.
